This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
The Awakeners' CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Playing {Distant Melody} temporarily reduces the DMG dealt by all "Humanoid" enemies by [Arg4]%, this effect can't be stacked. For each negative state dispelled by {Requiem}, [Arg3] Aliemus are gained.
